en: Am I the arsehole for not crying at my grandfather's funeral No they're well bore him
ko: 할아버지 장례식에서 안 울었으면 나쁜 놈이야? 아니 지루했겠지.

en: They let too many people talk at a funeral Oh it's so long There's too many speeches and they're always lying They were so

en: funny It's like I f***ing met her She weren't that funny man If she was on this show right now with this crowd she would struggle
ko: "정말 재밌었어요." 나 만나봤는데 그렇게 재밌지 않았어. 이 관객 앞에 서면 고생할 걸.

en: You'll be a deer in headlights
